com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.bootprovider

Interface BootProvider

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface BootProvider
extends Module

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void removeCustomBootAnimation()
      Remove the custom boot animation.
      void removeCustomBootLogo()
      Remove the custom boot logo.
      void setCustomBootAnimation(java.lang.String bootAnimation)
      Set the custom boot animation.
      void setCustomBootLogo(java.lang.String bootLogo)
      Set the custom boot logo.

    • Method Detail

      • setCustomBootAnimation

        void setCustomBootAnimation(java.lang.String bootAnimation)
                     throws NSDKException
        Set the custom boot animation.
        Parameters:
        bootAnimation - [Required] The absolute path of animation file, which should be signed in .zip format.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • removeCustomBootAnimation

        void removeCustomBootAnimation()
                        throws NSDKException
        Remove the custom boot animation.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setCustomBootLogo

        void setCustomBootLogo(java.lang.String bootLogo)
                throws NSDKException
        Set the custom boot logo.
        Parameters:
        bootLogo - [Required] The absolute path of logo file, which shall be signed in .img format.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • removeCustomBootLogo

        void removeCustomBootLogo()
                   throws NSDKException
        Remove the custom boot logo.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
